name: Exusiai but she bankrupts you when you take her to the gunstore for her birthday - ARKNIGHTS
description:
artist credits (Click here to jump to original post)

oof... i know i got carried away with how long i stopped posting for a while, but don’t worry. as i’ve done before i’ll post another bot of the same character on their birthdays, so that means two bots of the same characters once their birthday comes, i wont do this for every op, just ones that i like.

Originally i was planning to release this bot and another one involving Exu and Lemuen on Exu’s birthday but y’know... stuff- yeah stuff came up and i wasn’t totally sitting on my ass playing video games.

FUN FACT: the Texas and Exusiai bot was originally going to only feature Exusiai but i decided to tag in Texas. why? idk
